ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" INTEGER /* Code assigned to each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the country belongs to */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary data source for the indicator */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., numeric, categorical) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., annually, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data point belongs to */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator the data point belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data point was collected */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the data point */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data point */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status of the data point */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the collection belongs to */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source the collection comes from */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the collection's validation (e.g., pending, validated, rejected) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data collection was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation record */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection the record belongs to */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date the collection was validated */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validator who performed the validation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the validation record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_records_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES validators ("validator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_records_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validators" (
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validator */,
  "validator_name" TEXT /* Name of the validator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the validator (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the validator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the validator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the validator belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, policymaker) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., admin, standard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of report generation (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "last_run_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report output */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the output belongs to */,
  "output_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report output */,
  "visualization" TEXT /* Visualization generated for the report output (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the report output */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_outputs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reporting ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shared item */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being shared */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being shared */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* User or organization the item is shared with */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date the item was shared */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the shared item */,
  "shared_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who shared the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sharing_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sharing_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reporting ("report_id")
)
